steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The dash introduces: “the museum staff consulted numerous sources to ensure the accuracy of the displays.” This shows the research was thorough and carefully done.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: ”Rigor” directly expresses strict attention to detail and thoroughness—the quality demonstrated by consulting multiple sources to ensure accuracy. The others don't capture this quality: “obscurity” suggests unclear research, “shallowness” contradicts careful work, and “novelty” refers to newness. That matches choice A — A is correct.
